metadata.description: Personal collection of Agent Skills for project management, agent design, and learning workflows.

plugins.name: skill-gap-tracker
plugins.description: Flags unfamiliar languages, frameworks, or techniques encountered while building projects and logs them to a learning backlog.

plugins.name: agent-eval
plugins.description: Designs and runs evaluations for LLM or agent outputs — rubrics, LLM-as-judge scoring, regression test sets, and pass-rate reporting.

plugins.name: wiki-operator
plugins.description: Operates a Karpathy-style personal knowledge wiki via Obsidian MCP — searches before writing, updates existing concept pages over creating duplicates, merges redundant notes, and maintains links. Requires Obsidian MCP connected.
